series_metadata.series_title: Time Study Analysis on Permanent Total Disability; Quarterly
series_metadata.series_description: This report provides information to monitor trends for the issue of Permanent Total Disability. Only those claims in which a decision is final in nature are tracked. The report includes several analyses. Statistical analysis median is used to measure Permanent Total Disability adjudication time frames.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from publish date of report. ; Electronic: 10 years from publish date of report
